programme.desc: Dan Cabela explains the domestic trade in exotic wildlife and how some of our planet's most threatened species are being protected by the practice.

programme.title: Hard Truths Of Conservation
programme.desc: Facing extinction in recent history, Dan Cabela investigates the conservation model behind the recovery of alligator populations in the heart of Florida.

programme.title: Hard Truths Of Conservation
programme.desc: Dan Cabela joins conservationists in unraveling the complexity of human wildlife conflict and the reality of living with Africa's apex predator - the Lion. While the Cabela Family Foundation undertakes the largest ever lion translocation.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Capt. Justin Leake joins some old friends aboard the Fall Line in hopes of scoring big in the Bay Point Billfish Open. The trip will test the limits of all the anglers as the captain and crew do the impossible in hopes of bringing home the prize.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Hosts Justin Leake and Travis Holeman highlight the coastal lifestyle and diverse fishing opportunities in Panama City Beach, Fla.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: When tarpon first don't cooperate, it's time for Capt. Justin and friend Ethan Register to have a competition for dinner options in the Gulf's grocery store.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: PCB's white sand beaches are jam-packed with visitors soaking up the sun and surf while Justin and Meredith chase schools of migrating tarpon just offshore.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The crew makes it to the Bahamas and the incredible Green Turtle Club for a week of fishing, diving, and exploring the Abaco Island chain; they make the 200 mile crossings from Miami and Cape Canaveral to rendezvous at Green Turtle Cay.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The Green Turtle Cay adventure continues as the LK crew uncovers more of what the incredible out islands of the Bahamas have to offer.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Back in San Diego and with rockfish on the mind, the crew fish new grounds and depths to catch Southern California bottom fish; pro snowboarder and friend Dave Downing joins to round out the rock cod fishing trip.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Ali and Rush take advantage of the many other opportunities this time of year has to offer and switch focus back to the basics, targeting smaller yellowfin, bluefin, and mahi on bait.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: Is Colorado a Food Utopia? Exploring Farm to Table Cuisine, Epic Landscapes & UFO's
programme.desc: Colorado offers more than mountains and skiing; featuring unexpected attractions, including UFO lore and river surfing opportunities.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.sub-title: How This Photographer Manifested His Dream Home on the Oregon Coast
programme.desc: Tired of fixing up other people's houses, Ben decided to spend the last few years crafting his own house from the ground up, while getting help from his friends, Dad, and Sophie along the way.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.sub-title: Gulf Monsters with Captain Garrett Stephens
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Saltwater Experience Charters' Captain Garrett Stephens for a trip into the Gulf; when their catches get repeatedly cut off, they haul the massive bull sharks to the surface for a closer look.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.sub-title: Cobia Fishing with Captain Garrett Stephens
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland, Rich Tudor, and guest Captain Garrett Stephens encounter some cobia after wrestling with massive bull sharks; they use up all their strength and skill to keep these fish away from the sharks.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor use the 26' Yellowfin Hybrid to bring their Live Paddle Boards to an Islamorada flat; they have a fun day fishing for bonefish, and later, they encounter some toothy critters.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Capts. Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor run west from Hawks Cay to fish the spring tarpon migration at the legendary Bahia Honda Bridge.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.sub-title: Bonefishing Key West with Captain Brandon Cyr
programme.desc: Capts. Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head down to Key West to join Capt. Brandon Cyr for some skinny water bonefishing.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.sub-title: Baby Tarpon with Captain Brandon Cyr
programme.desc: Capts. Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor fish the Florida Keys with Capt. Brandon Cyr for baby tarpon in the mangroves.

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: The Cast aims to reveal various angling experiences tied to a deeper meaning through the lens of personal experiences; from fresh water in the Midwest, to exploring the saltwater of the coasts.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Focusing on the culture of fishing, as seen through the viewpoints of two drastically different fishermen.

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.sub-title: We Spent 14 Days Fly Fishing Florida

programme.title: Destination Dive
programme.desc: Key West is known for bars, nightlife and history, but its underwater world can be just as lively; visiting beautiful, resilient coral reefs and the crown jewel of the Keys: the USS Vandenburg shipwreck.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: The Ultimate Ireland Food Road Trip; Surfing, Golfing & Delicious Eats

programme.title: Hard Truths Of Conservation
programme.desc: Discover the pressing threat of Chronic Wasting Disease in North American whitetail deer and the fierce debate around the strategies aimed at its management.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle Green and Jeff Hutchinson set off to hunt gators on a lake in Texas, but things get rowdy when Kyle loses a bet and has to swim with the very gators he is hunting.

programme.title: Fox Hollow Outdoors
programme.desc: Michael and Larken travel to South Carolina's Lowcountry for a massive barbecue charity event supporting children battling serious illness; after serving up smoke for a great cause, they spend an extra day in the marsh chasing redfish.

programme.title: Stomping Grounds
programme.sub-title: Lone Star Boating: Exploring Central Texas Lakes & Rivers
programme.desc: The Boat Trader heads to central Texas to explore boating culture in Texas, known as the place where everything is bigger; the state is about more than big oil, college football and cattle farms: it's also home to the best boating in the country.

programme.title: Ship Shape TV
programme.sub-title: Ship Shape TV Essentials -- Maximizing Boat Utility & Applying Tuff-Coat
programme.desc: Tips for making improvements and repairs on boats and boat equipment.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal
programme.desc: Josh takes Isaiah to the blue water; they look for Destin's latest bite, the blackfin tuna.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Highlighting the stories and people who have made the shooting sports and hunting lifestyle a part of their lives.

programme.desc: Hosted by Heather Catlin, Hot Topics wraps up the week's most talked-about stories from across America.
